# On the Genealogy of Morality

*[Nietzsche](../philosophers/nietzsche.md) · 1887*

In three essays, Nietzsche traces the low and contingent origin of our moral values: the master / slave opposition, the making of bad conscience, and the meaning of the ascetic ideal. It is the most systematic statement of his genealogical method.
